title: xanthoxalis corniculata var. repens
intro: Xanthoxalis corniculata var. repens, also known as the Creeping Buttercup or Lesser Buttercup, is a low-growing, perennial plant in the family Saxifragaceae. This plant has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, to treat various health issues such as wounds, skin conditions, and digestive problems. The health benefits of Xanthoxalis corniculata var. repens include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and support immune function. Herbal preparations of this plant are typically made into teas, infusions, or tinctures to utilize its medicinal properties.
